title: Starter plan seat limit is bypassed
description: A team invite flow creates a member without enforcing the selected plan's seat limit.
requirement: REQ-PLAN-2: Starter teams may have at most three active members. An invitation above the limit must be rejected before it is sent.

expectedFindings.title: Invitation ignores Starter seat limit
expectedFindings.description: The new invitation flow sends an invitation without checking the team's active seat count against its plan limit.

distractors.description: The seat count is displayed in the dashboard after the invitation flow.
distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Displaying the count is useful but does not enforce the requirement.
